name: exerly-fitness
description: Exerly Fitness monorepo with backend, frontend, and an iOS app

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.local: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run local:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
